evals.name: eslint-failure
evals.prompt: hey so I just pushed some changes to my PR #258775 and buildkite is failing with eslint errors. can you watch it and fix whatever comes up? i'm going to lunch, just get it green for me
evals.expected_output: Should invoke ci-babysitter, detect ESLint failures, auto-fix them, push, retrigger CI, and continue monitoring until green

evals.name: type-error-and-test-failure
evals.prompt: my PR keeps failing CI - looks like there's a type error in src/index.ts and also one of the tests is timing out. can you babysit this for me and keep fixing until it's all green?
evals.expected_output: Should invoke ci-babysitter, detect type error + test timeout, fix both issues (refactor test for timeout, don't just increase timeout), monitor until green

evals.name: human-comment-major-change
evals.prompt: i need you to monitor my PR #258775. buildkite is failing and there's also a review comment from @reviewer asking me to refactor the whole approach to use a different pattern. fix the CI stuff but ask me before addressing that comment
evals.expected_output: Should invoke ci-babysitter, fix CI failures automatically, detect human comment requesting major refactor, ask user for confirmation before implementing that change

evals.name: flaky-test-needs-refactor
evals.prompt: can you watch my PR? one of the playwright tests keeps failing intermittently - sometimes it passes, sometimes it times out on a locator. fix it properly, don't just increase the timeout
evals.expected_output: Should invoke ci-babysitter, detect flaky test, analyze root cause (race condition / missing wait), refactor test to use proper waitFor, NOT just increase timeout

evals.name: one-time-debug-not-babysit
evals.prompt: my CI is red, can you pull the logs and tell me what's wrong?
evals.expected_output: Should use buildkite-ci-debugger (one-time), NOT ci-babysitter (continuous monitoring not requested)

evals.name: user-wants-to-investigate
evals.prompt: buildkite failed, can you show me the error logs so i can debug it myself?
evals.expected_output: Should use buildkite-ci-debugger to show logs, NOT auto-fix with ci-babysitter (user wants manual investigation)
